posts.title: A Homepage That Reshapes Itself
posts.excerpt: I rebuilt this site as a single cluster of nodes that morphs into a different shape for every section — no framework, no build step, just vanilla JS and a hand-rolled 3D scene on a 2D canvas. A short note on the idea and the tech behind it (without spilling every detail).

posts.title: Turning a 30-Minute Chore into One Command
posts.excerpt: Manual store onboarding — installing a cart widget into a Shopify or BigCommerce theme — was a careful, error-prone half hour. I turned it into a single Claude Code skill that pulls the theme, finds where the code belongs, edits it, and pushes a draft. Plus the gotchas: content-driven file discovery, an async duplicate-theme race, and cutting theme pulls from hundreds of API calls down to a handful.

posts.title: Automating My Dev Journal with GitHub Actions and Claude
posts.excerpt: How I built a system that crawls my GitHub activity every week, sends it to Claude for summarization, and renders an interactive tree timeline on my portfolio — with zero maintenance.
